subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted toward the Kingdom and have drunk the Wine, the nature of which is cool and exhilarating! In these days that the Bestowals of the Kingdom of Abha
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @stories; anecdotes
